sqlMap.select: select * from FinancialInstSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FinancialInstSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey IsApplPerformServiceToBankruptcy IsApplServedAsCEOCouncel IsFinanInstProvideAggrement IsApplHadEquityInterest IsApplClientDeclaredInsolvent IsApplProvideServToCompliance InterestOrCommAmounts IsAppHaveKnwOfFidilityOff LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #IsApplPerformServiceToBankruptcy# #IsApplServedAsCEOCouncel# #IsFinanInstProvideAggrement# #IsApplHadEquityInterest# #IsApplClientDeclaredInsolvent# #IsApplProvideServToCompliance# #InterestOrCommAmounts# #IsAppHaveKnwOfFidilityOff# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select IsApplPerformServiceToBankruptcy, IsApplServedAsCEOCouncel, IsFinanInstProvideAggrement, IsApplHadEquityInterest, IsApplClientDeclaredInsolvent, IsApplProvideServToCompliance, InterestOrCommAmounts, IsAppHaveKnwOfFidilityOff, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FinancialInstSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FinancialInstSuppLW set
IsApplPerformServiceToBankruptcy = #IsApplPerformServiceToBankruptcy# IsApplPerformServiceToBankruptcy = null IsApplServedAsCEOCouncel = #IsApplServedAsCEOCouncel# IsApplServedAsCEOCouncel = null IsFinanInstProvideAggrement = #IsFinanInstProvideAggrement# IsFinanInstProvideAggrement = null IsApplHadEquityInterest = #IsApplHadEquityInterest# IsApplHadEquityInterest = null IsApplClientDeclaredInsolvent = #IsApplClientDeclaredInsolvent# IsApplClientDeclaredInsolvent = null IsApplProvideServToCompliance = #IsApplProvideServToCompliance# IsApplProvideServToCompliance = null InterestOrCommAmounts = #InterestOrCommAmounts# InterestOrCommAmounts = null IsAppHaveKnwOfFidilityOff = #IsAppHaveKnwOfFidilityOff# IsAppHaveKnwOfFidilityOff = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FinancialInstSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FinancialInstSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select IsApplPerformServiceToBankruptcy, IsApplServedAsCEOCouncel, IsFinanInstProvideAggrement, IsApplHadEquityInterest, IsApplClientDeclaredInsolvent, IsApplProvideServToCompliance, InterestOrCommAmounts, IsAppHaveKnwOfFidilityOff, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FinancialInstSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, IsApplPerformServiceToBankruptcy, IsApplServedAsCEOCouncel, IsFinanInstProvideAggrement, IsApplHadEquityInterest, IsApplClientDeclaredInsolvent, IsApplProvideServToCompliance, InterestOrCommAmounts, IsAppHaveKnwOfFidilityOff, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from FinancialInstSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
